SEARCH

Package me.kevinboone.jgemini.protocol

package me.kevinboone.jgemini.protocol

This package contains classes that handle the various network protocols that JGemini supports -- Gemini, Gopher, etc. Each protocol has a handler which is a subclass of URLConnection. There are also some exceptions in this package, which perhaps ought to be elsewhere.

For each protocol we have a subclass of URLConnection that does the real work, and a subclass of URLStreamHandler that instantiates it. The various URLStreamHandler instances are registered with the JVM using JGeminiStreamHandlerFactory.

  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    me.kevinboone.jgemini
    This is the base package for everything in the JGemini application.
    me.kevinboone.jgemini.base
    This package contains the interfaces that define the JGemini classes, along with some fundamental utilities for SSL, configuration management, and Filename processing.
    me.kevinboone.jgemini.bundles
    This package contains everything in JGemini that might need to be translated.
    me.kevinboone.jgemini.converters
    This package contains the classes that convert various document types -- Gemtext, Gophermaps, etc -- into HTML, for rendering in the Swing document viewer.
    me.kevinboone.jgemini.ssl
    Utility classes for handling identity and certificates.
    me.kevinboone.jgemini.swing
    The Swing user interface for JGemini.
  • Class
    Description
    AboutConnection
    A subclass of URLConnection that handles URLs of the form "about:/xxx".
    AboutURLStreamHandler
    A URLStreamHandler that instantiates AboutConnection instances.
    ErrorResponseException
    An Exception that represents an error response received from a remote server, after establishing a connection successfully.
    GeminiConnection
    A subclass of URLConnection that handles the Gemini protocol.
    GeminiURLStreamHandler
    A URLStreamHandler that instantiates GeminiConnection.
    GopherConnection
    A subclass of URLConnection that handles the Gopher protocol.
    GopherURLStreamHandler
    A URLStreamHandler that instantiates GopherConnection.
    JGeminiURLStreamHandlerFactory
    A factory for creating our customer URLStreamHandler instances, according to the URL protocol.
    NexConnection
    A subclass of URLConnection that handles the nex: protocol.
    NexURLStreamHandler
    A URLStreamHandler that instantiates NexConnection.
    RedirectedException
    A URLConnection subclass throws this exception when it gets a response indicating a redirection.
    RetryWithInputException
    This Exception is thrown by the Gemini and Spartan connection classes, when the server sends a response that indicates it wants some additional data -- which usually means prompting the user for input.
    SpartanConnection
    A subclass of URLConnection that handles the Spartan protocol.
    SpartanURLStreamHandler
    A URLStreamHandler that instantiates SpartanConnection.
